name: GetCustomerOrderHistory
bodySql:
SELECT o.id, o.order_date, o.status, o.total
FROM orders o
WHERE o.customer_id = @customerId
ORDER BY o.order_date DESC;
description: Fetches recent orders for a customer.

name: AdjustProductStock
bodySql:
UPDATE products SET stock = stock + @delta WHERE id = @productId;
SELECT id, name, stock FROM products WHERE id = @productId;
description: Adjusts product inventory and returns the updated row.
